name: Grilled Pompano with Smoked Tomato and Balsam
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vinaigrette:
- 4 large red ripe tomatoes
- 1/2 small onion, minced
- 3 tablespoons (TB) basil chiffonade
- 12-year-old balsamic vinegar
- Salt and pepper to taste
2. Make 1/2-inch deep slits, 2-inches apart on both sides of the pompano.
3. Smoke the pompano for 1 hour at 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Remove the pompano from the smoker and lightly oil it.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Grill the pompano for 7 minutes on each side.
7. Serve with vinaigrette.
